positive: A stylized, minimalist line art illustration featuring a group of whimsical, bioluminescent woodland creatures (fox, owl, deer, and raccoon) interacting in a glowing forest scene. The scene should utilize deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted with bright neon accents (electric cyan, lime green) for the glowing flora and animals' glowing markings. Composition should be symmetrical and centered, emphasizing clean, strong silhouettes against a slightly darker background. Style: Geometric, Nordic folk art meets modern tattoo flash. Perfect for apparel print, vector quality, high contrast, ultra-detailed, 8k resolution.
negative: blur, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, distorted, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, cartoonish, photorealism
